text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Do you think ghosts really exist?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Where can you go to find them? And<n>must it
really be at night?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I heard that ghosts are people who have<n>
unfinished business in this world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I would like to speak to them and ask<n>what it is
that keeps them so<n>passionately tied to our
realm.
